Rythmos® Plus Wearable

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

GPS + LTE
Fall detection
Activity tracking
Outdoor capable

Overview

Rythmos® Plus Wearable is an advanced wearable device designed for continuous resident monitoring both inside and outside the community.

FUNCTIONS

Provides real-time location tracking
Enables one-press nurse call alerts
Supports automatic fall detection
Collects health and activity data

Key Capabilities

Indoor
+ Outdoor Tracking

Seamless
location visibility across all environments

GPS
& LTE Connectivity

Enables
tracking beyond facility boundaries

Integrated
Nurse Call

One-press
alert for immediate response

Automatic
Fall Detection

ML-based
monitoring and alerts

Access
Integration

Enables
proximity-based door access

Continuous
Monitoring

Tracks
movement, activity, and engagement

Hardware Specifications

Power: Rechargeable battery (0-100% in ~2 hours)
Connectivity: BLE · GPS · LTE
Battery Life: Up to 3 months (usage dependent)
Water Resistance: Shower-safe
Wear Options: Wristband or pendant
Interface: Soft press button
Indicators: LED visual indicator
Security: Optional locking band
Maintenance: Hot-swappable

System & Safety Features

Full-location visibility: Tracks residents across facility and external environments

Elopement risk management: Supports detection and response to unauthorized exits

Real-time alerts & notifications: Immediate alerts for movement, falls, or distress

Centralized monitoring: All data available in Rythmos® Care Manager

Behavior & activity insights: Supports care decisions and trend analysis

Scalable deployment: Works across entire care ecosystem

System Topology — Plus Wearable Deployment

Ideal for tracking and monitoring critical assets or individuals throughout the facility. Deploy in accordance with the community's layout to ensure full coverage and reliable alert delivery via the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure.

Installation Guidelines

Setup

- Assign device via platform
- Configure GPS and alert settings

Wearability

- Ensure proper fit (wrist or pendant)
- Use locking band if required

Charging

- Recharge regularly (~2 hours full charge)
- Recharge based on usage and GPS activity

Maintenance

- Wipe with soft cloth
- Safe for daily wear

Care

- Avoid physical damage
- Ensure strap integrity

Service

- OTA updates supported
- Remote diagnostics via platform

intrexis.com
